name: Garlicky Baked Vegetables with Spoon Bread Topping
recipeIngredient: 2 Tomatoes, medium, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix melted butter, flour, Lemon-pepper seasoning, salt, and rosemary.
3. Add peas, onion, garlic, potatoes, and tomatoes to the mixture. Stir until all vegetables are coated evenly.
4. Transfer the vegetable mixture to a greased baking dish.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 30-35 minutes or until the vegetables are tender and lightly browned.
6. Serve hot with spoon bread on top.
